title: spex Graph (graph.json)
description: The intermediate format every spex input adapter (trace, ps-tree, brew-deps, disk-usage, pstree-demo) produces and every view (graph-print, graph-layout) consumes. Trees/forests only: GraphNode.parent is a single optional id, not a general edge list — see docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.

title.description: One-line human description of what this graph is, e.g. "traceroute to www.de-cix.net". May be entirely absent (defaults to null).

metric_label.description: What GraphNode.metric measures and its unit, e.g. "avg RTT (ms)". May be entirely absent (defaults to null).

parent.description: id of the parent node, or null for a root. Multiple roots form a forest. This key must be present (possibly null) even though it may hold no value.

metric.description: Generic numeric weight driving color/size in the layout; unit described by the graph's metric_label. May be entirely absent (defaults to null).

metadata.description: Free-form source-specific fields (ip, hostname, hop number, pid, ...). May be entirely absent (defaults to {}).
